notes: Eval 3 (troubleshoot-branch) is a simple enough problem that baseline without skill also achieves 100% pass rate. This reduces the aggregate pass rate delta.
Eval 1 and Eval 2 show massive skill value: baseline without skill hallucinates Rails thoughtbot Paperclip gem on eval 1, and provides generic/vague instructions on eval 2.
With skill, all 3 evals achieve 100% pass rate.

Key differentiators for the skill: explicit 'master' branch warning (not 'main'), exact PAPERCLIP_PUBLIC_URL and PAPERCLIP_ALLOWED_HOSTNAMES env vars, /paperclip volume mount, uid 1000 chown command, disable health check, onboarding via 'docker exec ... paperclipai onboard', CEO invite URL extraction.
Minor suggestion: Consider adding more advanced evals (e.g., custom domain deployment).
